cfo_workcap.title: Wareegga Raasumaalka Shaqada
cfo_workcap.askPrompt: Wareeggeyga raasumaalka shaqada: DIO {dio} maalmood, DSO {dso} maalmood, DPO {dpo} maalmood. Wareegga U-beddelka Lacagta Caddaanka = {ccc} maalmood. Qiimaha kaydka {inventory}, la-sugayaasha {receivables}, deynaha la bixinayo {payables}. Sidee ku gaabin karaa wareeggeyga u-beddelka lacagta caddaanka anigoo ah {smbLabel}?
cfo_workcap.cccStatusExcellent: Aad u fiican — lacagtu way soo gashaa ka hor inta aan bixin
cfo_workcap.cccStatusGood: Wanaagsan — wareeg gaaban oo u-beddelka lacagta caddaanka ah
cfo_workcap.cccStatusFair: Dhexdhexaad — caadi u ah dukaamada tafaariiqda ee yaryar
cfo_workcap.cccStatusLong: Wareeg dheer — lacagtu waxay xayirantahay muddo dheer
cfo_workcap.dioHint: Muddada kaydku fadhiisto ka hor inta aan la iibin
cfo_workcap.dsoHint: Muddada macaamiishu qaataan si ay kuu bixiyaan
cfo_workcap.dpoHint: Muddada aad qaadato inaad bixiso alaab-qeybiyayaasha (dheer = ka fiican lacagta)
cfo_workcap.dioReduceImpact: Waxay sii daysaa {amount} raasumaal shaqo ah
cfo_workcap.dioAction1: Iib-dhameys ku samee kaydka gaabis ah (alaabta > 60 maalmood)
cfo_workcap.dioAction2: Yaree tirooyinka dib-u-dalabka badeecooyinka ugu hooseeya 20%
cfo_workcap.dioAction3: U wareeji xilliga-saxda ah alaabta si dhakhso ah u socota
cfo_workcap.dsoAction1: Bixi {paymentMethods} si dhaqso ah loo dhammeeyo
cfo_workcap.dsoAction3: Bixi qiimo-dhimis 2% oo bixin-hore ah (waxay badbaadisaa {discount} laakiin dedejisaa lacagta)
cfo_workcap.dpoExtendImpact: Waxay {amount} muddo dheer kuu hayaa xisaabtaada
cfo_workcap.dpoAction1: La xaajood shuruudaha net-30 saddexda alaab-qeybiye ee ugu sarreeya
cfo_workcap.dpoAction2: Isku dar dalabyada si loo kordhiyo shuruudaha ku saleysan tirada
cfo_workcap.dpoAction3: Isticmaal lacag-bixinno jadwalaysan halkii aad isla markiiba wax u bixin lahayd
cfo_workcap.negativeCycleTitle: Wareegga lacagtu waa taban yahay — jago aad u fiican
cfo_workcap.negativeCycleImpact: Lacagta waad ururisaa ka hor inta aadan bixin alaab-qeybiyayaasha
cfo_workcap.negativeCycleAction1: Sii wad xiriirka alaab-qeybiyayaasha si aad u hayso shuruudahan
cfo_workcap.negativeCycleAction2: Tixgeli inaad bixiso qiimo-dhimis bixin-hore alaab-qeybiyayaasha si aad u badbaadiso dheeraad
cfo_workcap.negativeCycleAction3: Dib ugu maalgeli lacagta la haysto koritaanka ama qalabka dulsaar keena
cfo_workcap.cccReductionHint: Yareynta CCC 10 maalmood waxay sii daysaa ~{amount} raasumaal shaqo ah
